## Summary

A brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Code coverage is at or above 80%
- [ ] ESLint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Code is formatted with Prettier (`npm run format`)
- [ ] New logic has comments explaining the *why* where it isn't obvious
- [ ] README or docs updated if behavior changed

## Testing Notes

Describe how you tested this change. Include any edge cases you checked.
